scripts.build: npm run verify:client:deps && npm run client:build
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:client:shell && npm run test:client:theme-contract && npm run test:client:embedded-shell && npm run test:controller && npm run test:packaging && npm run test:sprint6
scripts.test:all: npm run verify:client:deps && npm run test:unit && npm run test:sprint4 && npm run build
scripts.verify:client:deps: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='client/node_modules/react/jsx-runtime.js'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)){ console.error('[artist] missing client dependencies. Run npm run install:all'); process.exit(1);} console.log('[artist] client dependencies ok');"
scripts.test:sprint4: npm run test:controller && node --test tests/artistRoutes.contract.test.mjs tests/artistHardDelete.contract.test.mjs tests/artistEmbeddedSpacing.contract.test.mjs tests/shellBridge.test.mjs tests/artistModalLayout.contract.test.mjs tests/embeddedShellMode.test.mjs tests/shellIntegration.test.mjs tests/themeContract.test.mjs
